n Head can cover up the
Natal Moon which is the causitive planet of mind and make the
Native's mind dull and eclipsed.
Also Dragon Head is Mayakaraka causing illusions and is
of Demonic, temperament.
Venus is the female power substance and when water
compound is excessive, this female power loses its strength. Again
Venus is the causitive planet of daughter-in-law; whereas Moon
is the causitive planet of Mother-in-Law. So Daughter-in-law-
Venus is inimical to Mother-in-law-Moon.
Venus is inimical to Moon because Moon is expenditure,
while Venus is wealth and hence are not concordant in their
aspects.

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 31
MARS
Mars is causitive of ego. Saturn is work and Dragon Head
is Tamoguna Mercury is intellect and hence Mars is not
concordant with these three planets. Saturn represents worker. An
egoistic worker attracts the wrath of all-his superiors, his
colleagues, and his subordinates. The egoistic employee quits or
